meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve no version control (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Solving No Version Control for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop losing code without version control. Master AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to save your projects and impress your clients today.
content.answer_block: Without version control, every bug is a potential project-ender. By leveraging AI-driven debugging via Claude Code and Antigravity, you can systematically reconstruct state, pinpoint logic regressions, and refactor brittle codebases into stable, professional-grade assets without needing a traditional Git history. This approach turns chaos into a reproducible, high-velocity development workflow.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you just realized your project lacks a Git history. You are staring at a fragile codebase, terrified that one wrong keystroke will collapse the entire architecture. It is the freelancer's worst nightmare: high stakes, zero safety net, and no room for error.

But the era of manual, gut-wrenching debugging is over. By integrating Antigravity and Claude Code into your workflow, you can treat your codebase as a living, predictable system. We aren't just fixing bugs; we are architecting resilience into projects that were never built to last.

steps.title: Snapshot the Current State
steps.description: Before touching a single line, establish a baseline. Use AI to generate a functional summary of the current codebase to serve as your 'virtual commit'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and file contents. Generate a comprehensive JSON manifest of all active functions, dependencies, and known state variables.

steps.title: Automated Regression Mapping
steps.description: Identify the exact points of failure by comparing expected behavior against the current brittle state using AI-inferred test cases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of unit tests for the identified critical path functions based on the current implementation flaws.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for critical path' --output-dir ./tests

steps.title: Isolate Logic Rot
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace execution flows and identify where the lack of version control has led to redundant or conflicting code blocks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan for dead code and conflicting logic patterns that deviate from standard design principles.

steps.title: AI-Assisted Refactoring
steps.description: Apply fixes in small, verifiable increments. Use AI to rewrite brittle modules while maintaining interface consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified legacy module to improve modularity and error handling without changing external API signatures.

steps.title: Implement Synthetic Versioning
steps.description: Establish a future-proof workflow by having the AI generate automated documentation and state-change logs for every session.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized change-log template that tracks all architectural changes made during this session.

pro_tips: Always run your AI analysis in a clean environment to ensure the model isn't hallucinating based on residual local artifacts.
Use Antigravity's 'diff-mode' to visualize changes before committing them to your live server, effectively creating a manual layer of version control.
When debugging, feed the AI the stack trace and the manifest generated in Step 1 simultaneously to provide context-aware solutions.
Leverage Claude Code to build a local 'test-harness' that runs every time you save, mimicking a CI/CD pipeline in a zero-Git environment.
Keep your AI prompts modular; if a task is too complex, break it into three distinct AI-assisted steps to maintain high precision.
resources: Best Practices for AI-Assisted Development: https://anthropic.com/resources
content.next_steps: Immediately initialize a local Git repository—even without history—to start tracking your AI-verified progress from this point forward.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting fragile code dictate your success. Use these tools to ship cleaner, faster, and more reliably than ever before. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
